response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed video content: 00:00-02:15 contains talk about birthday products, and 02:15-04:30 contains a performance of 'Gold Unbalance'. 2. Identified performers as Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei via visual inspection. 3. Used web search to find official lyrics for 'Gold Unbalance' using the songwriters' names (Yuki Tsujimura, Mori Calliope). 4. Verified lyrics are complete and accurate. 5. Formatted output into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei introducing products for Mori Calliope's Birthday 2026, followed by a musical performance of the song 'Gold Unbalance'.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei talk to the audience and promote merchandise for 'Birthday 2026'.
Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei perform the song 'Gold Unbalance'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In a story filled with uncertainties,
We struggle to win our identity.
Trying this and that,
Changing our tactics and methods.
Passion stabs the chest, making it skip a beat.
The emotions are non-fiction,
Joy, anger, sorrow, pleasure,
Two bodies, one soul,
All of our impulses.
Taste both failure and success,
We are the golden buddy.
In this world that seems meaningless,
Light formed by layers of coincidence.
Pulse-pounding heartbeat,
We cannot become anyone else,
So weave your own words.
Don't look down on us!
A little bit of courage is enough.
With confidence, climb to the heights,
Overwhelming, climax,
If it's the two of us, we can do it.
Back-to-back, no matter what,
The things we carry become our weapons, spot.
A shout that flies far, different in level,
Nobody can block this route.
1st, 2nd, 3rd, that kind of ranking,
A loser from the start.
Greedy to the point of being annoying,
Steal the heart from hell.
It's not a loop of reincarnation,
The route is infinite,
It's not a common path,
An expert who loves the thorny path.
Let's laugh grandly now,
The gradation of talent and worldly desires.
If we're going to do it, let's make a mess of it.
If you've started, have the determination to see it through.
A duet of the loser and the winner,
Inferiority complex,
Scraps of absurdity that were expelled.
Shake it off, greedily,
The ambition will not disappear,
If it's the two of us, we can do it.
What does it mean to live?
Does the slacker win?
Such things,
Crush them!
We can't just be on the surface,
Entertain-rider,
Bet your life and run through it,
Both despair and glory,
Lemme see you fight back.
(Woah-woah-woah) No matter what happens, nothing will change,
(Woah-woah-woah) Trapped in a memed reality,
This life where we're stuck taking chances,
You're tired of it, aren't you??
We're living in a world with no direction,
Reach out with our light 'till we make a connection,
Tearing the walls apart,
Facing it all, side by side,
Once again, it's us against the world.
Don't look down on us!
Make our instincts tingle,
Show off the real thing,
Overwhelming, climax,
Dance the unbalance.
